title: oberonia ovalis
intro: Oberonia ovalis, also known as the "orchid of the forest floor," is a type of flowering orchid native to the tropical forests of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia ovalis include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Oberonia ovalis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Asian remedies for its purported health benefits.
